name: expression-fixer
description: Detect and fix unnatural Chinese workplace writing in reports, summaries, emails, and status updates.

interface.longDescription: Expression Fixer reviews Chinese workplace documents such as weekly reports, project updates, summaries, and emails. It flags meta-language leakage, exposed sources, awkward collocations, repetitive sentence patterns, unsuitable tone, information overload, and overconfident claims, then provides a minimally edited full rewrite.
defaultPrompt: Use $expression-fixer:expression-fixer to polish this Chinese report.
帮我检查这段周报表达哪里不像人话。
